readings.summary: Because the bread is one, though we are many we are one

I am the living bread that came down from heaven,
says the Lord; whoever eats this bread will live forever.
I am the living bread from heaven.

antiphons.text:
He fed them with the finest wheat
and satisfied them with honey from the rock.

Whoever eats my flesh and drinks my blood
remains in me and I in him, says the Lord.

gathering.title: I Am the Bread of Life
gathering.description: "No one who comes to me shall hunger again"
